From YA 2024 onwards

Chargeable IncomeRate (%)Gross Tax Payable ($)
First $20,00000
Next $10,0002200
Next $10,0003.5350
Next $40,00072,800
Next $40,00011.54,600
Next $40,000156,000
Next $40,000187,200
Next $40,000197,600
Next $40,00019.57,800
Next $40,000208,000
Next $180,0002239,600
Next $500,00023115,000
In excess of $1,000,00024

For YA 2025, all tax resident individuals will receive a Personal Income Tax Rebate of 60%, capped at $200.

For YA 2024, all tax resident individuals will receive a Personal Income Tax Rebate of 50%, capped at $200.
